title: Three-Five
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] known as Three-Five|the rookie [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] known as [[35 (Ando Prime)|35]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:Clonetrooper35.jpg]] |name=Three-Five |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{SWE|groups|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}}''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hey Three-Five, check it out: commandos.''"
"''If they're anything as good as I hear, they can practically win the war themselves…|[[17]] and Three-Five, upon spotting Boss|}} '''Three-Five''', also known as '''35''', was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who fought in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], Three-Five and 17 were defending the rear approach to a barricade that was being defended by other [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] against Separatist [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]]. [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commando]] [[Boss (clone commando)/Legends|Boss]] encountered the two [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] shortly before the [[Battle droid/Legends|droids]] blew through a wall. Boss, Three-Five, and the other surviving clones held off the assaulting [[Droid/Legends|droids]], pushing them back to a Separatist gun emplacement. ==Biography== Three-Five, also known as 35, was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on the [[Water/Legends|water]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. The clone served as a [[Clone trooper/Legends|trooper]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and a separatist group known as the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. When the Republic [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|invaded]] the Separatist planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' Three-Five was part of the deployed forces. While on Geonosis, clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] Three-Five and [[17]] were guarding the rear entrance to a barricade that was being defended internally by other troopers against advancing [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] when the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Boss (clone commando)/Legends|Boss]] approached the group. Trooper 17, noticing the [[Commando/Legends|commando]], pointed out his presence to Three-Five. Seeing Boss, Three-Five expressed how commandos could win the war if they were as highly skilled as was rumored. As Boss reached the group, Separatist [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] blew through a wall to avoid the barricade, [[Death/Legends|killing]] one of the clone troopers. Trooper Three-Five and the other surviving clones engaged the attacking [[Battle droid/Legends|droids]], pushing them back to a Separatist gun emplacement. ==Personality and traits== Like all clones of Jango Fett, Three-Five stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. They held great respect for clone commandos, remarking that the specialist clones were highly capable in battle upon sighting commando Boss on Geonosis. ==Equipment== Three-Five wore [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]]''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' and was armed with a [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15S]],''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]'' customary of Republic clone troopers at the beginning of the Clone Wars. ==Behind the scenes== Clone trooper Three-Five appeared in the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|first-person shooter]] ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'', released in [[2005]].{{InsiderCite|Special Edition 2022|Sith Unseen: A Retrospective}} The character was voiced by [[Roger Jackson]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Republic Commando: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Republic Commando'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=35#legends }} [[Category:Clone troopers]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
